reviews.review_description: Alot of bad stuff is said about meta that clouds the good stuff they do. This is really cute, short and shows how voice commands can make for a unique experience. I'm glad a played this

developer_response.body: Thank you for trying it out! We are glad you enjoyed the experience!

reviews.review_title: What is the purpose of this game?
reviews.review_description: I dont have to add much. I was not able to do anything here, as it asked me to use voice comands to do stuff but would not recognize anything I was saying.

developer_response.body: Hello! Could you please make sure you have Microphone enabled on your headset and have given the app Microphone permission when it asks for it on opening?
